name: Crockpot Appetizer Ribs
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle ribs with salt and pepper.
2. Place in crockpot; pour water over them.
3. Cover and cook on low for 6-7 hours or until tender.
4. Drain the ribs.
5. Arrange ribs on broiler pan; sprinkle with garlic salt.
6. Make sauce by combining salad dressing and pineapple juice.
7. Brush ribs with half the sauce.
8. Broil until brown, turn, brush other side and brown.
Makes 8-10 appetizer servings. If possible, ask the butcher to cut each rib in half, crosswise, so they will be a more convenient size to handle the appertizer.
